final_state.rendered_mermaid:
graph TD
    Idle["Idle"]
    loaded["loaded"]
    tracking["tracking"]
    analyzing["analyzing"]
    reporting["reporting"]

turn.speaker: 工程师张
turn.content: 李工，我们来设计这个工业物联网的状态机吧。首先需要确定系统的初始状态，所有IoT操作都从这里开始。

metadata.alignment_note: Stage 1 creates idle node. Turns 1-2 discuss establishing idle as starting point, Turn 3 confirms idle as entry point with 0 edges.

turn.speaker: 工程师李
turn.content: 好的，张工。我认为系统的起点应该是空闲状态，表示设备处于待机状态，还没有执行任何工业物联网操作。

metadata.alignment_note: Stage 1 creates idle node. Turns 1-2 discuss establishing idle as starting point, Turn 3 confirms idle as entry point with 0 edges.

planner.notes: Stage 1/5, adds 1 nodes, 0 edges, current state now contains 1 nodes and 0 edges

turn.speaker: 工程师张
turn.content: 同意。我们把初始状态定义为idle，这是整个状态机的入口点。现在系统有一个节点idle，0条边。

metadata.alignment_note: Stage 1 creates idle node. Turns 1-2 discuss establishing idle as starting point, Turn 3 confirms idle as entry point with 0 edges.

turn.speaker: 工程师李
turn.content: 接下来我们需要定义主要的操作容器。当模块加载后，系统应该进入loaded状态，这样才能进行后续的工业操作。

metadata.alignment_note: Stage 2 adds loaded node and 3 edges. Turn 4 introduces loaded state concept, Turn 5 adds LOAD edge (e1), Turn 6 adds self-loop (e2) and UNLOAD edge (e32), Turn 7 summarizes 2 nodes 3 edges, Turn 8 transitions to next stage discussion.

planner.notes: Stage 2/5, adds 1 nodes, 0 edges, current state now contains 2 nodes and 0 edges

turn.speaker: 工程师张
turn.content: 对。从idle到loaded需要一个LOAD转换，并且携带IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode的上下文信息，表示通过边缘节点进行加载。

metadata.alignment_note: Stage 2 adds loaded node and 3 edges. Turn 4 introduces loaded state concept, Turn 5 adds LOAD edge (e1), Turn 6 adds self-loop (e2) and UNLOAD edge (e32), Turn 7 summarizes 2 nodes 3 edges, Turn 8 transitions to next stage discussion.

turn.speaker: 工程师李
turn.content: loaded状态本身还需要一个自循环的LOAD边，允许重新加载或刷新已加载的模块。另外，从loaded也应该能通过UNLOAD返回idle进行清理。

metadata.alignment_note: Stage 2 adds loaded node and 3 edges. Turn 4 introduces loaded state concept, Turn 5 adds LOAD edge (e1), Turn 6 adds self-loop (e2) and UNLOAD edge (e32), Turn 7 summarizes 2 nodes 3 edges, Turn 8 transitions to next stage discussion.

turn.speaker: 工程师张
turn.content: 现在我们有2个节点和3条边了。主干架构已经建立：idle是起点，loaded是操作容器，它们之间通过LOAD和UNLOAD转换连接。

metadata.alignment_note: Stage 2 adds loaded node and 3 edges. Turn 4 introduces loaded state concept, Turn 5 adds LOAD edge (e1), Turn 6 adds self-loop (e2) and UNLOAD edge (e32), Turn 7 summarizes 2 nodes 3 edges, Turn 8 transitions to next stage discussion.

turn.speaker: 工程师李
turn.content: 下一步应该添加实时监控的能力。tracking状态可以处理实时遥测数据跟踪和内部状态管理操作。

metadata.alignment_note: Stage 2 adds loaded node and 3 edges. Turn 4 introduces loaded state concept, Turn 5 adds LOAD edge (e1), Turn 6 adds self-loop (e2) and UNLOAD edge (e32), Turn 7 summarizes 2 nodes 3 edges, Turn 8 transitions to next stage discussion.

turn.speaker: 工程师张
turn.content: 从loaded到tracking需要一个START转换，配合IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic上下文，启动PLC逻辑控制。

metadata.alignment_note: Stage 3 adds tracking node and 11 edges. Turn 8 initiates tracking concept (boundary overlap), Turn 9 adds START edge (e6), Turn 10-11 add self-loop edges (e7-e11), Turn 12-13 add IMPORT edges (e12, e13), Turn 14-15 add RESET (e27), LOAD (implied), and UNLOAD edge (e33). Turn 16 wraps up tracking with 3 nodes 14 edges.

planner.notes: Stage 3/5, adds 1 nodes, 6 edges, current state now contains 3 nodes and 6 edges

turn.speaker: 工程师李
turn.content: tracking状态内部还需要多个自循环操作：STATE用于内部状态检查，TRANSITION用于状态转换监控，GATE用于门控条件管理。

metadata.alignment_note: Stage 3 adds tracking node and 11 edges. Turn 8 initiates tracking concept (boundary overlap), Turn 9 adds START edge (e6), Turn 10-11 add self-loop edges (e7-e11), Turn 12-13 add IMPORT edges (e12, e13), Turn 14-15 add RESET (e27), LOAD (implied), and UNLOAD edge (e33). Turn 16 wraps up tracking with 3 nodes 14 edges.

turn.speaker: 工程师张
turn.content: 还有ACTION和EVENT，分别用于内部动作执行和事件处理。这些都是tracking状态的自我操作能力。

metadata.alignment_note: Stage 3 adds tracking node and 11 edges. Turn 8 initiates tracking concept (boundary overlap), Turn 9 adds START edge (e6), Turn 10-11 add self-loop edges (e7-e11), Turn 12-13 add IMPORT edges (e12, e13), Turn 14-15 add RESET (e27), LOAD (implied), and UNLOAD edge (e33). Turn 16 wraps up tracking with 3 nodes 14 edges.

turn.speaker: 工程师李
turn.content: tracking还需要导入功能。通过IMPORT操作，可以从loaded状态导入IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController，执行器控制器。

metadata.alignment_note: Stage 3 adds tracking node and 11 edges. Turn 8 initiates tracking concept (boundary overlap), Turn 9 adds START edge (e6), Turn 10-11 add self-loop edges (e7-e11), Turn 12-13 add IMPORT edges (e12, e13), Turn 14-15 add RESET (e27), LOAD (implied), and UNLOAD edge (e33). Turn 16 wraps up tracking with 3 nodes 14 edges.

turn.speaker: 工程师张
turn.content: 也可以在tracking内部通过IMPORT导入IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream，遥测数据流。这样就能持续接收传感器数据了。

metadata.alignment_note: Stage 3 adds tracking node and 11 edges. Turn 8 initiates tracking concept (boundary overlap), Turn 9 adds START edge (e6), Turn 10-11 add self-loop edges (e7-e11), Turn 12-13 add IMPORT edges (e12, e13), Turn 14-15 add RESET (e27), LOAD (implied), and UNLOAD edge (e33). Turn 16 wraps up tracking with 3 nodes 14 edges.

turn.speaker: 工程师李
turn.content: tracking状态还需要退出路径。RESET可以返回loaded状态重新配置，UNLOAD可以直接返回idle进行完全清理。

metadata.alignment_note: Stage 3 adds tracking node and 11 edges. Turn 8 initiates tracking concept (boundary overlap), Turn 9 adds START edge (e6), Turn 10-11 add self-loop edges (e7-e11), Turn 12-13 add IMPORT edges (e12, e13), Turn 14-15 add RESET (e27), LOAD (implied), and UNLOAD edge (e33). Turn 16 wraps up tracking with 3 nodes 14 edges.

turn.speaker: 工程师张
turn.content: tracking到loaded还有一个LOAD边，可以将跟踪数据加载回来。当前已经有3个节点和14条边了。

metadata.alignment_note: Stage 3 adds tracking node and 11 edges. Turn 8 initiates tracking concept (boundary overlap), Turn 9 adds START edge (e6), Turn 10-11 add self-loop edges (e7-e11), Turn 12-13 add IMPORT edges (e12, e13), Turn 14-15 add RESET (e27), LOAD (implied), and UNLOAD edge (e33). Turn 16 wraps up tracking with 3 nodes 14 edges.

turn.speaker: 工程师李
turn.content: 现在我们有了实时监控层。接下来需要添加数据分析能力，analyzing状态可以将原始遥测转化为有价值的洞察。

metadata.alignment_note: Stage 3 adds tracking node and 11 edges. Turn 8 initiates tracking concept (boundary overlap), Turn 9 adds START edge (e6), Turn 10-11 add self-loop edges (e7-e11), Turn 12-13 add IMPORT edges (e12, e13), Turn 14-15 add RESET (e27), LOAD (implied), and UNLOAD edge (e33). Turn 16 wraps up tracking with 3 nodes 14 edges.

turn.speaker: 工程师张
turn.content: 从tracking到analyzing通过ANALYZE转换，配合PLC逻辑上下文进行分析处理。loaded也可以直接跳转analyzing进行快速分析。

metadata.alignment_note: Stage 4 adds analyzing node and 6 edges. Turn 16 introduces analyzing state, Turn 17 adds ANALYZE edges (e14, e15), Turn 18 adds RESET/UNLOAD/LOAD edges (e4, e28, e34), Turn 19 adds BACK edge (e30) with 4 nodes 20 edges summary.

planner.notes: Stage 4/5, adds 1 nodes, 16 edges, current state now contains 4 nodes and 16 edges

turn.speaker: 工程师李
turn.content: analyzing状态也需要RESET返回loaded，以及UNLOAD直接到idle的清理路径。还有LOAD边可以加载分析结果回loaded状态。

metadata.alignment_note: Stage 4 adds analyzing node and 6 edges. Turn 16 introduces analyzing state, Turn 17 adds ANALYZE edges (e14, e15), Turn 18 adds RESET/UNLOAD/LOAD edges (e4, e28, e34), Turn 19 adds BACK edge (e30) with 4 nodes 20 edges summary.

turn.speaker: 工程师张
turn.content: analyzing提供了回退能力，BACK操作可以导航回tracking状态，方便检查原始数据。系统现在有4个节点和20条边。

metadata.alignment_note: Stage 4 adds analyzing node and 6 edges. Turn 16 introduces analyzing state, Turn 17 adds ANALYZE edges (e14, e15), Turn 18 adds RESET/UNLOAD/LOAD edges (e4, e28, e34), Turn 19 adds BACK edge (e30) with 4 nodes 20 edges summary.

turn.speaker: 工程师李
turn.content: 很好。现在需要添加报表生成功能，reporting状态作为最终输出层，汇总分析结果并导出。

metadata.alignment_note: Stage 4 adds analyzing node and 6 edges. Turn 16 introduces analyzing state, Turn 17 adds ANALYZE edges (e14, e15), Turn 18 adds RESET/UNLOAD/LOAD edges (e4, e28, e34), Turn 19 adds BACK edge (e30) with 4 nodes 20 edges summary.

turn.speaker: 工程师张
turn.content: 从analyzing到reporting有多种报表生成方式：通过EdgeNode生成SUMMARY或DETAILED报告，通过ActuatorController生成GAP分析报告。

metadata.alignment_note: Stage 4 adds analyzing node and 6 edges. Turn 16 introduces analyzing state, Turn 17 adds ANALYZE edges (e14, e15), Turn 18 adds RESET/UNLOAD/LOAD edges (e4, e28, e34), Turn 19 adds BACK edge (e30) with 4 nodes 20 edges summary.

turn.speaker: 工程师李
turn.content: 还有通过TelemetryStream生成ALL_REPORTS全量报告。analyzing也可以直接EXPORT_HTML或EXPORT_JSON到reporting状态。

metadata.alignment_note: Stage 4 adds analyzing node and 6 edges. Turn 16 introduces analyzing state, Turn 17 adds ANALYZE edges (e14, e15), Turn 18 adds RESET/UNLOAD/LOAD edges (e4, e28, e34), Turn 19 adds BACK edge (e30) with 4 nodes 20 edges summary.

turn.content: reporting状态内部也有多种操作能力：EXPORT_HTML和EXPORT_JSON支持多种IoT上下文的自循环导出。

turn.content: 完整生命周期是从idle开始，经过loaded加载模块，然后tracking进行实时监控，再到analyzing数据分析，最后reporting生成报表输出。
